body.text: RTB · 2A WEEKLY INTEL · Week of Jul 6 – Jul 10, 2026
Virginia goes from 'muddled' to blocked statewide — on a schedule: the Santolla injunction goes universal July 21

Monday a three-judge panel denied consolidation of the four VA ban suits; Thursday a statewide injunction (reported eff. Jul 21, through July 2027) scheduled the end of the patchwork era. DOJ's confirmed California Glock-ban suit sits fully briefed awaiting a TRO ruling.

facts.title: 2. Virginia AWB — statewide injunction, eff. Jul 21
3. The 'common use' test — the week's doctrinal thread

body.text:
• [Calendar] Jul 21 — VA statewide injunction takes effect (confirm v. order)
• [Carry-over] DOJ v. California 'Glock ban' TRO ruling — imminent
• [Calendar] Aug 4–5 — ATF comment windows close (EITB; 926A transport)
• [Predicted] VA seeks emergency stay/narrowing before Jul 21
